title: 8 Herbal Tinctures For Altitude Sickness
description: Withania somnifera tinctures contains bioactive constituents like withanolides, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling in the brain caused by high altitude. Withanolides also work as vasodilators, widening blood vessels and improving blood flow to oxygen-starved tissues. This improved circulation helps reduce symptoms of altitude sickness, such as headaches and fatigue. Additionally, withanolides have antioxidant properties that protect the body from oxidativ...
